summary: Iteration 12 — Targeted verification of two Focus Session bug fixes (timer text overflow + tab-backgrounding false-abandon). Backend pytest 11/11 PASSED (regression on /api/session/abandon, /api/roasts/check, /api/users/notification-settings, auth/habits/shop). Frontend Playwright verified BOTH bug fixes end-to-end on the live preview URL with measured DOM metrics and a real 6-second wall-clock background simulation. ALL 8 sub-bug checks PASS. No defects found.
passed_tests: BUG-1a PASS: '14:59' timer width = 240.9px vs inner-circle diameter 309.2px → 77.9% (within the 78% design budget). Center-aligned: timer center (640.0, 273.99) vs svg center (640.0, 274.00) → dx<1px, dy<1px. Flex-centered confirmed.

BUG-1b PASS: Simulated 7-char timer '1:00:00' by overriding --digit-chars=7 → text width 236.2px vs diameter 308.5px = 76.6% (still inside 78% budget). Font auto-scales from 87.4px (5 chars) down to 62.5px (7 chars). H:MM:SS will fit.

BUG-1c PASS: SVG computed filter = 'drop-shadow(rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.35) 0px 0px 16px) drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 8px 24px)' — exact spec match (16px blur 35% #3B82F6 glow + 8px-y 24px black 30% drop shadow). Timer text-shadow also includes white top-edge highlight (0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.35)) + blue glow layers.

BUG-2a PASS: Set document.visibilityState='hidden' + dispatched visibilitychange + window blur, then real-wait 6s. Focus session stayed mounted; timer decreased 14:59 → 14:52 (7s — matches real wall-clock elapsed including processing time). No penalty toasts (no gems/shield/abandon toasts visible). Wall-clock derivation from Date.now() works as designed.
BUG-2b PASS: window.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur')) alone does NOT abandon — focus-session still visible after 2s.
BUG-2c PASS: Visibility change to 'hidden' then back to 'visible' restored an immediate setNow(Date.now()) recompute (verified by 7s decrement matching real elapsed time, no freeze).
BUG-2d PASS: Abandon Session button → abandon-modal opens → confirm-abandon-btn → POST /api/session/abandon returned 200 → focus-session unmounted cleanly. Explicit abandon flow intact.
REGRESSION PASS: Backend POST /api/session/abandon still returns {gems_deducted, shield_consumed, roast} (pytest TestSessionAbandon::test_abandon_deducts_gems_and_returns_roast).

REGRESSION PASS: Game Mode admin@habitrpg.com still uses checkbox flow (verified in iteration_11 and unchanged in this iteration; FocusSession code path is gated by !isGameMode in HomePage which was not touched).
critical_code_review_comments: FocusSession.js wall-clock derivation is clean: state is derived (elapsed = Math.min(totalSeconds, Math.floor((now - startTimeRef.current) / 1000))), interval just bumps `now` every 500ms — browser-throttling-immune by design.
visibilitychange/focus/pageshow handlers only call setNow(Date.now()); they NEVER call onAbandon. Confirmed by code inspection and by 6s-background test producing zero abandon side effects.

Font-size calc fontSize: calc(var(--circle-size) * 0.668 / (var(--digit-chars) * 0.55)) is sound — confirmed at runtime: 5-char yields 87.4px text, 7-char yields 62.5px text, both well inside the inner ring.
SVG filter chain (drop-shadow blue 16px + drop-shadow black 8px-y 24px) matches the elevated treatment spec exactly.
Minor (carry-over from iter 11, NOT regressed): When data.gems_deducted === 0 the toast shows '-0 gems'. Not in scope of this bug report — left for future polish.
Minor: lucide-react `X` icon is imported in FocusSession.js but never used (line 3). Safe to remove. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing TEST_gems_habit_v8 morning habit on the Focus test account. Account had a session abandoned during test (clean unmount, 200 OK).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both Focus Session bugs are fully fixed and verified. Timer text fits ≤78% of inner-circle diameter at all char counts (5 = 77.9%, 7 = 76.6%). Ring has the elevated drop-shadow filter chain. Wall-clock derivation via Date.now() + setNow tick handles tab backgrounding cleanly — no penalty fires unless user explicitly clicks Abandon. Backgrounding simulation in Playwright works via: Object.defineProperty(document, 'visibilityState', {value:'hidden', ...}) + dispatchEvent(visibilitychange) + window blur, then real wait, then restore. The explicit abandon API path (POST /api/session/abandon) is unchanged and still functional. Code is production-ready for these two bug fixes.
rca of the issue: N/A — main agent's fix is verified working. Original RCA: (1) Old timer used absolute-positioned text with fixed font-size that overflowed 6-7 char strings — now flex-centered span inside relative container with font-size = D*0.668/(chars*0.55) auto-scales per char count. (2) Old code likely used a tick-based decrementing counter that paused under browser throttling and a visibility/blur listener that mistakenly called onAbandon — now state is derived from Date.now() each tick, and visibility/focus/pageshow handlers ONLY refresh `now`, never abandon.
